3317620.name: Clan Duramont
3317620.description:
PRESENTATION

This is a classic 2D old-school RPG in the style of the retro Super NES and Genesis RPGs such as Final Fantasy and Dragon Quest.

The Clan Duramont is a Family who has fought the demons in the Avant Kingdom for generations. For the moment they are born, they are raised and trained to face the evil forces that haunt the kingdom.

Lothar, the last of his brothers, and father of Draco, Viktor, Lorena and Victoria, has to face his oldest foe one more time, the demon Pagunga. As fate would have it, said battle will test the Duramont Family, twisting it and breaking it, forcing them to hold the pieces together so they can hope to triumph against Pagunga and his demon legion.

Journey into an adventure of family, courage, betrayal and redemption. Join the Clan Duramont.

FEATURES

  • 15 to 20 hours of gameplay

  • Multiple party members

  • A vast world to explore, from snowy locations to deserts, ruins, forests and temples

  • Mouse Support

  • Autosave function
